Summarize Visit-Level Immunization Evaluations

Source: R/summarize_visit_evaluations.R
summarize_visit_evaluations.Rd

Summarize output from evaluate_visits(), producing counts and percentages of visits where vaccines were due, given, or missed. Grouping can be flexibly specified with flags and additional grouping columns.

Usage

summarize_visit_evaluations(
  visit_output,
  antigens_of_interest = NULL,
  by_year = TRUE,
  by_antigen = TRUE,
  group_cols = NULL,
  percent_var = "PCT_GIVEN_IF_DUE",
  verbose = TRUE,
  output_format = c("long", "wide")
)

Arguments

visit_output

A data.table returned by evaluate_visits(). Must contain standardized columns defined in VISIT_RETURN_COLUMNS, including ANTIGEN, VISIT_DATE, DUE, GIVEN, and MISSED. Must also have attribute "processed" set.

antigens_of_interest

Character vector of antigen names to include. Default is NULL, in which case all antigens in the data are used.

by_year

Logical; if TRUE, group by VISIT_YEAR. Default TRUE.

by_antigen

Logical; if TRUE, group by ANTIGEN. Default TRUE.

group_cols

Optional character vector of additional grouping column names.

percent_var

Character; which percentage column to pivot on in wide format. Default is "PCT_GIVEN_IF_DUE". Other valid options are "PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE", "PCT_WITHIN_15_DAYS_IF_MISSED", "PCT_WITHIN_30_DAYS_IF_MISSED", "PCT_WITHIN_90_DAYS_IF_MISSED".

verbose

Logical; if TRUE, progress messages are printed. Default is TRUE.

output_format

Either "long" (default; stacked rows with antigen labels) or "wide" (one row per group, antigens as columns).

Value

A data.table summarizing the requested antigens:

  • In "long" format: one row per group with counts, percents, and labels.

  • In "wide" format: one row per grouping set, columns for each antigen.

Examples

# Summarize all antigens, grouped by year and antigen
summarize_visit_evaluations(visit_output)
#> No antigens_of_interest provided. Using all existing antigens: POLIO, HIB, PCV, HEPA, HEPB, HPV, MCV, MENB, TETANUS, ROTA, COVID, RSV, MMR, VZV, INFLUENZA
#> Starting visit-level summarization...
#> Completed summarization at 2025-09-16 10:57:35.005124
#>      VISIT_YEAR   ANTIGEN VISITS    DUE GIVEN MISSED DELAYED_PRIOR
#>           <int>    <char>  <int>  <int> <int>  <int>         <int>
#>   1:       2016     POLIO 230211 203470 94715 113716         63309
#>   2:       2016       HIB 199252 128160 91058  46557         13192
#>   3:       2016       PCV 183305 113089 91817  35631          9244
#>   4:       2016      HEPA 171076 171076 58209 112867         29369
#>   5:       2016      HEPB 178081 156494 48358 113760         14192
#>  ---                                                              
#> 128:       2024     COVID 574412 574412  5914 568498             0
#> 129:       2024       RSV 176753 176753  2847 173906             0
#> 130:       2024       MMR 306870 142972 41320 101981         23041
#> 131:       2024       VZV 314131 162474 48298 114438         33128
#> 132:       2024 INFLUENZA 257838 257838 22010 235828            61
#>      DELAYED_VISIT DELAYED_NEXT GIVEN_WITHIN_15_DAYS GIVEN_WITHIN_30_DAYS
#>              <int>        <int>                <int>                <int>
#>   1:          4081        20304                 7815                11595
#>   2:          5837        21175                 8064                11692
#>   3:          5450        18394                 7640                10970
#>   4:          7855        51950                 5744                 9506
#>   5:          2989        17909                 6007                10635
#>  ---                                                                     
#> 128:             0            0                  759                 1303
#> 129:           789          733                 1483                 2335
#> 130:          8035         2425                 3770                 5824
#> 131:         12802         3808                 4645                 7239
#> 132:          1950          404                 2444                 4182
#>      GIVEN_WITHIN_90_DAYS PCT_GIVEN_IF_DUE PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE
#>                     <int>            <num>             <num>
#>   1:                18828       0.46549860         0.5588834
#>   2:                17459       0.71050250         0.3632725
#>   3:                15639       0.81190036         0.3150704
#>   4:                18141       0.34025229         0.6597477
#>   5:                23002       0.30900865         0.7269288
#>  ---                                                        
#> 128:                 2185       0.01029575         0.9897043
#> 129:                 2970       0.01610722         0.9838928
#> 130:                 8300       0.28900764         0.7132935
#> 131:                10583       0.29726602         0.7043465
#> 132:                 6119       0.08536368         0.9146363
#>      PCT_WITHIN_15_DAYS_IF_MISSED PCT_WITHIN_30_DAYS_IF_MISSED
#>                             <num>                        <num>
#>   1:                  0.068723838                  0.101964543
#>   2:                  0.173207037                  0.251133020
#>   3:                  0.214420028                  0.307877971
#>   4:                  0.050891758                  0.084223024
#>   5:                  0.052804149                  0.093486287
#>  ---                                                          
#> 128:                  0.001335097                  0.002292005
#> 129:                  0.008527595                  0.013426794
#> 130:                  0.036967670                  0.057108677
#> 131:                  0.040589664                  0.063256960
#> 132:                  0.010363485                  0.017733263
#>      PCT_WITHIN_90_DAYS_IF_MISSED
#>                             <num>
#>   1:                  0.165570368
#>   2:                  0.375002685
#>   3:                  0.438915551
#>   4:                  0.160729000
#>   5:                  0.202197609
#>  ---                             
#> 128:                  0.003843461
#> 129:                  0.017078192
#> 130:                  0.081387709
#> 131:                  0.092478023
#> 132:                  0.025946877

# Group only by SYSTEM and SITE (no year, no antigen), wide format by missed%
summarize_visit_evaluations(visit_output,
  by_year = FALSE, by_antigen = FALSE, group_cols = c("SYSTEM","SITE"),
  output_format = "wide", percent_var = "PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE")
#> No antigens_of_interest provided. Using all existing antigens: POLIO, HIB, PCV, HEPA, HEPB, HPV, MCV, MENB, TETANUS, ROTA, COVID, RSV, MMR, VZV, INFLUENZA
#> Starting visit-level summarization...
#> Error in summarize_visit_evaluations(visit_output, by_year = FALSE, by_antigen = FALSE,     group_cols = c("SYSTEM", "SITE"), output_format = "wide",     percent_var = "PCT_MISSED_IF_DUE"): Grouping columns not found in data: SITE
